query:
UPDATE community_digests 
SET statsSnapshot = JSON_OBJECT(
  'bookingsThisWeek', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-19 00:00:00'),
  'totalCommissionClaimed', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(grossAmount), 0) FROM commission_claims WHERE claimedAt >= '2026-05-19 00:00:00' AND status IN ('paid','awaiting_payment')),
  'reimbursementsCount', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refunds WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-19 00:00:00')
)
WHERE id = 1;

  'totalCommissionClaimed', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(grossAmount), 0) FROM commission_claims WHERE claimedAt >= '2026-05-19 00:00:00' AND status IN ('paid','awaiting_payment')),
  'reimbursementsCount', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refunds WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-19 00:00:00')
)
WHERE id = 1;
